  "workable": [],
  "findings": [
    "Incorrect 3/5-valve manifold operation sequence: equalizing valve was not opened before opening the high-pressure (HP) block valve, risking transmitter damage due to overpressure/one-sided pressure spike."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Stop work immediately",
    "Close all manifold valves to isolate the transmitter",
    "Verify transmitter calibration and zero-shift to ensure no damage occurred",
    "Re-train personnel on correct manifold commissioning sequence per manufacturer procedures"
  ],
  "rationale": "Operating a 3-valve or 5-valve manifold out of sequence by failing to equalize before opening the high-pressure side can subject the differential pressure sensor to a damaging overpressure condition on one side. The work must be stopped, the transmitter checked for damage, and the correct sequence followed.",
  "references": [
    "Manufacturer installation and operating manual (manifold/transmitter procedures)",
    "ISA-RP60.11 (Recommended Practice for Instrument Manifolds)"
  ]
}
